occurrence_sentence: QuTech and Intel have delivered the first qubit made in the very same industrial manufacturing facilities that mass-produce conventional computer chips.

occurrence_sentence: "Industrial manufacturing techniques are different from the techniques that are typically used to fabricate such quantum dot samples," says Anne-Marije, first author and PhD researcher at QuTech—a collaboration between the TU Delft and TNO.

interaction_phrase: a collaboration between the TU Delft and TNO
occurrence_sentence: It was as if we were first writing with calligraphy and now, we changed to a stencil machine. The former gives more flexibility, the latter gives a significant improvement in yield and uniformity. Moreover, instead of making 20 devices at a time, a fabrication round now gives us tens of thousands of devices, allowing us to collect statistics on the device properties.
